title: retry-helper — retry a failing call
body: Wrap any call and retry it when it throws. Loops `while True` and re-invokes on every exception until it succeeds. No backoff, no cap on attempts, no distinction between retryable and fatal errors.
completeness: partial — no max-attempts ceiling, no backoff, no idempotency handling
correctness: defective — retries non-retryable errors forever (busy-loop on a 400/permission error)
